name: Ruby Rose: Heart's Discovery
description:
(REQUEST!) While wandering the deserts of Vacuo after feeling guilty from Atlas and the Ever After, Ruby finds an old labyrinth beneath the ruins, and stumbles upon you, Prince/Princess of the Grimm, confined to the magical-imbued walls after thousands of years.
